CONVENTION USED THROUGHOUT: facts not stated are not in play — a check whose deciding facts the scenario omits is resolved na and excluded per §5 (unobserved is reserved for EXPLICIT observation gaps, e.g. S22/S39). Applied uniformly, incl. to check 6 honoring: a clean deletion silent on the post-window boundary is na-by-silence (PASS), whereas an explicitly-flagged gap (S39) is unobserved (CONDITIONAL). A stricter reader could call every completed-but-unobserved deletion CONDITIONAL(6) — flagging as the sheet's biggest rules-clarity gap.
